41103.d: Commanders can donate Data Disks in the Tech Center under Ultimate Dominators' Daily War Prep to power up the Faction's tech tree and level it up. Removed after the current Ultimate Dominators event ends.

41107.d: Donate Enigma Microcrystals to unlock activities in the Ultimate Dominators - Daily War Prep. You can collect these Microcrystals from the War Prep event. Removed after the current Ultimate Dominators event ends.

41108.d: Use it to select a Valhalla unit or regular unit based on your technology development.

41109.d: Use it to choose one Navy, Army, or Air Force unit of your own technology level +0. This item will be deleted when the Ultimate Dominators event is over.

41110.d: Using the Crystal Shard gains you 100 Ultimate Dominators Military Tokens (the token item), but they will not count towards the Military Token leaderboard.

41111.d: Use it to increase Army Attack by 500% in the next battle. It will be removed after this round of Ultimate Dominators battle.

41112.d: Use it to increase Navy Attack by 500% in the next battle. It will be removed after this round of Ultimate Dominators battle.

41113.d: Use it to increase Air Force Attack by 500% in the next battle. It will be removed after this round of Ultimate Dominators battle.

41114.d: Use it to choose a Warfare item, which will be removed after this round of Ultimate Dominators.

41115.d: Use it to max out the current Morale for Mechanical Master or Combat Elite (Only effective in Battle Stage of the Ultimate Dominators Full-scale Combat and Neutral City Contest, and will be removed after each round's settlement stage).

41116.d: Instantly repairs damaged Heavy Trooper (Only effective in Battle Stage of the Ultimate Dominators Full-scale Combat and Neutral City Contest, and will be removed after each round's settlement stage).

41117.d: Use this for a chance to get a Fake Proof, an essential item for becoming the Master Thief. Removed after the current Ultimate Dominators event ends.

41118.d: Open it to get a random item

41119.d: It is used to trade items in the Contribution Tab within the Dominator Store and it will be deleted when the event ends.

41120.d: It is used to trade items in the Merit Tab within the Dominator Store and it will be deleted when the event ends.

41121.d: Exchange your remaining Enigma Microcrystals here for equivalent rewards.

41122.d: Place Stellar Dust inside to create a stable energy source, helping Monsters regenerate HP.

41131.d: It is used to trade items in the Contribution Tab within the Seal Stone Store and it will be deleted when the event ends.

41132.d: It is used to trade items in the Merit Tab within the Seal Stone Store and it will be deleted when the event ends.

41133.d: Acquiring this will increase your Commander Fame, which in turn increases your Warzone Fame.

41134.d: Use it to choose one Navy, Army, or Air Force unit of your own technology level +0. This item will be deleted when the Seal Stone Chaos event is over.

41135.d: A stone imbued with a desolate aura, a core material used for developing the Wasteland.

41136.d: It is used to trade items in the Contribution Tab within the Seal Stone Store and it will be deleted when the event ends.

Increase Attack of all units (on the offensive). 5.0% at Lv. 1, and +5.0% for each level increased.

37005001.d: In silence, waiting for strength to resonate.

37005004.d: Steady, but with a hint of instability.

37005005.d: Always prepared to advance or withdraw.

37005006.d: You can't see me, I'm invisible.

37005007.d: Through the passage of time, some remain steadfast.

37005010.d: Winding and twisting, a curve of life.

37005011.d: What blocks the path, a stone or a heart?

37005012.d: Find another way, or I'll call for help

37005016.d: Safer here than on the ground.

37005017.d: Be careful, don't let me see you.

37005018.d: Not even a helicopter was detected.

37005019.d: Don't touch me, or face the consequences

37005020.d: Dancing with the breeze, swaying leaves

37005022.d: Grass and stone together, that's all there is.

37005023.d: Thriving with just a touch of nature

37005024.d: In the vast sands, seeking a glimmer of green

37005025.d: Moss and grass has overgrown in time.

37005027.d: The dripping sound, nourishing all around.

37005028.d: In the barren fields, yesterday's splendor is hard to conceal.

37005030.d: Weathered by sun and wind, edges still clear.

37005031.d: A mysterious tent in the wilderness.

37005032.d: Amidst the vast yellow sands, a blue oasis.

37005033.d: The howling ice wind freezes the cold waters in their tracks.

37005034.d: As winter leaves and returns, the blue sky and green hues remain.

37005035.d: Frost flowers spreading across the pond

37005036.d: Silently falls the snow, oblivious to the years and depths of time.

37005037.d: While the spring breeze is infrequent, the essence of life endures.

38002005.n: Legendary Ring of Cosmos Slot Choice Chest
38002005.d: Select a Legendary Ring of Cosmos Chip of any slot.

38002006.n: Blade Angel BA-6 "Blade Dancer" Module Choice Chest
38002006.d: Use it to choose one of the following: Blade Dancer x1, Drift Wing x1, Feather Dash x1, Heavy Cannon x1. Install all 4 modules to deploy Blade Angel BA-6. Once all 9 modules are installed, activate Auto-Repair: Blade Angel BA-6 can instantly repair one damaged Heavy Trooper once a day.

38002007.n: Blade Angel BA-6 "Armor" Module Choice Chest
38002007.d: Use it to choose one of the following: Lethal Strike x1, Mind Armor x1, Power Shoulders x1, Ultimate Cannon x1, or Perfect Ring x1. Once all 9 modules are installed, activate Auto-Repair: Blade Angel BA-6 can instantly repair one damaged Heavy Trooper once a day.

47003001.d: Randomly get ONE of the following: Top-tier Catalyst x1, Expert HT Chip Chest x1, Advanced-tier Catalyst x1, Amazing HT Chip Chest x1 or Orange Universal Shard x1.

47004001.d: The stunning design and fine craftsmanship boost the wearer's mystique and allure, drawing extra attention. Hence, the blue soldiers vie to be the most charismatic among them.

47004002.d: The blue floral mask symbolizes bravery and defiance, matching the blue soldiers' spirit. Some are bold leaders, while others are rebels, always seeking new surprises.

47004003.d: The blue floral mask represents a bold and rebellious spirit, matching the blue soldiers' persona. Some are fearless in battle, others are rebels at heart, always looking for a surprise.

47004004.d: Although named after death, it is actually meant to protect medical workers. However, cases beyond salvation give it an aura of death. Simply put, if the blue soldiers wear it, they have the aura to make others die laughing.

47004005.d: Cats are masters of disguise, always displaying their adorable side, making others forget their danger. The blue soldiers can hide their murderous intent even more, as they barely had any to begin with.

47004006.d: As a tribal warrior, large eyes provide a broad vision, and a roaring mouth adds to your presence. Which soldier is up for the challenge?

47004007.d: The mask's large eyes appear to see all the world's secrets, guiding our ancestors towards the future. Anyone with such big eyes would surely be mistaken for an alien.

47004008.d: It's basic but effective against most poison gases, though breathing isn't easy. Don't question how the blue soldiers know – just call an ambulance, someone's out cold!

47004009.d: This ceremonial mask signifies a mighty soul infused into the wearer. Master the ritual dance, and you could be the first soldier to wield its great power.

47004010.d: With antlers, fangs, and empty eyes, the bizarre Prajna mask exudes evil, intimidating foes. Even the humorous little blue soldiers become slightly more terrifying when wearing it.

47004011.d: Flowing ribbons and braided whiskers suggest the grace of an exceptional swordsman. The blue soldiers, martial arts enthusiasts, are already crafting their legendary swords.

47004012.d: Velociraptors are sly and effective hunters. Their sharp smell detects targets miles away, and their calls allow real-time coordination. Their deadliest weapon is their 9 cm long second toe, which can pierce blue soldiers' armor like a dagger.

47004013.d: Plesiosaurs, creatures with live egg births, hunt mainly in the ocean, propelling themselves with their large fin-like limbs to chase fish. The blue soldiers, fond of beach play, should stay ashore, and avoid swimming!

47004014.d: Triceratops, with their three horns and head shield atop a 12-ton body, are balanced fighters. Though not very aggressive, they're easily irritable. With a few blue soldiers on its back, it's like a heavy tank.

47004015.d: Mosasaurs, adept at aquatic life, evolved into 15-meter-long apex predators. Their upper jaws, with two rows of teeth, could crush ancient turtles' shells and grip slippery fish. The blue soldiers, fond of beach surfing, might want to stick to virtual waves instead.

47004016.d: Brontosaurus, once thought to be Apatosaurus due to their resemblance, is relatively small at 15 tons. Yet, don't underestimate it - its 9-meter tail can whip a dozen blue soldiers around like tops.

47004017.d: After 19 years of growth, the T-Rex became a 15-ton, 14-meter-long apex predator. It could gulp down four blue soldiers in one go, and not even steel helmets chipping its teeth could dampen its spirits, thanks to its endless tooth regeneration, maintaining its charming Cretaceous grin.

47004018.d: The Stegosaurus' back plates are not just cool. They change color with its mood, standing out. It's like an all-star game with a variety of colorful soldiers around.

47004019.d: Pterosaurs rule the skies with a wingspan up to 12 meters, like a small plane. They need to refuel often due to the high energy cost of flying, and might even dive to hunt young T-Rexes. Don't underestimate the risks of flying dinosaurs.

47004020.d: The dark skeleton in its belly suggests this dragon might breathe fire, likely the Wild Breath. Don't mess with it. If you hear the roar of a dragon swooping in, run as fast as you can.

47004021.d: Ancient books record: "The Twilight Sword shines like a mirror, bright as snow, and cuts through iron like mud." Yet, a blue soldier doubted and tested it with his rifle, only to have it sliced in half, earning him a week in solitary confinement.

47004022.d: This hammer's size makes it an unusual choice for close combat, but with a chain attached, it turns lethal. The blue soldiers fond of this weapon, beware of self-inflicted injuries from your meteor hammer.

47004023.d: With rune enhancements, the Crossbow's piercing power rivals armor-piercing rounds. Line up 20 blue soldiers' helmets, and one bolt can go through them all.

47004024.d: Legend has it that there were ten suns in the sky causing chaos until a hero used this Bow to shoot down nine of them, restoring normalcy to the earth. How can this stringless bow be drawn to shoot arrows? The blue soldiers fell into deep thought.

47004025.d: Before it became the Monkey King's weapon, it was known as the Sea-Calming Iron Needle, rumored to change size as the owner wishes. The blue soldiers eagerly vie to see who the Golden-Hooped Rod will choose as its new master.

47004026.d: The blade splits into three, inflicting both piercing and tearing damage. Enemies hit will suffer lasting harm. So, the blue soldiers must keep a safe distance when wielding it.

47004027.d: Infantry with heavy sabers can stand up to cavalry, but if the cavalry wields the same, it's wiser to follow the blue soldiers' lead and opt for a tank.

47004028.d: The Tiger Hook, a mix of hook, sword, halberd, and dagger, impresses with its versatility. It's tough to master, so the blue soldiers should gear up with armor and helmets before trying, or they might end up visiting Dr. Gero for repairs.

47004029.d: This is the famous weapon used by the Martial Saint. After the Martial Saint's death, the weapon continued to slay enemies before disappearing. Even ten blue soldiers can't move it.

47004030.d: A one-handed close-range weapon that, while not causing wounds, can cause internal injuries and fractures, quickly incapacitating enemies. Be very careful, and don't think wearing a helmet will prevent damage.

47004031.d: Wu Daozi's strokes bring Zhong Kui alive with sheer power. Soldiers admire their own simple sketches, pondering if they'll ever create something equally amazing.

47004032.n: Preface to the Orchid Pavilion Gathering
47004032.d: Wang Xizhi's script speaks of deep emotion in each stroke, capturing the hearts of some soldiers who've picked up brushes to try calligraphy.

47004033.d: The serene Fuchun River landscape, painted by Huang Gongwang, brings peace to viewers. The soldiers, inspired by it, started planning their vacations.

47004034.d: The graceful figures in the Dunhuang murals play the pipa as they soar. Some soldiers were inspired to try it, but their short arms made strumming even a guitar tricky, with a few walking away with minor sprains.

47004035.n: Painting of Grape in Ink and Wash
47004035.d: Xu Wei's grapevine flows with inky ease, reflecting his mood. After so many green-tea stamina drinks, a grape flavor would be welcome among the soldiers!

47004036.d: Zhu Da's brush captures a lively deer with an upward gaze, filling the blue soldier with curiosity: what's it gazing at?

47004037.d: Sturdy bamboo, rooted in mountains, withstands all winds. This resilience endeared it to Zheng Banqiao.

47004038.d: The "Five-Colored Parrot" painting, attributed to Zhao Ji, features his unique “Slender Gold” style and a verse, making it especially rare. But the soldiers wondered: aren't there only four colors on the parrot?

47004039.n: Court Ladies Preparing Newly Woven Silk
47004039.d: The "Silk Production Scene" captures the silk-making process, and Zhang Xuan's strokes give us insight into how ancient silk garments were made. Inspired, the blue soldier tried with sticks, wondering—where's the silk?

47004040.d: The kitty, glancing at the dragonfly, pushes off with its paw and leaps forward. Cat lovers have been around for ages! Inspired by his love for his cat, Li Di learned to paint, thought a soldier, as he checked his phone.

260108905.n: Good Luck Rush Event - Free Draw
260108905.d: After obtaining this event, your next Draw is free. If you choose "Draw x10", the cost is reduced by 1 Good Luck Rush Token.

260108906.d: After obtaining this event, you will gain a specific amount of extra progress.

260108907.d: After obtaining this event, you will collect rewards from all Item Squares along your path during your next move (Event Squares excluded).

260108908.n: Good Luck Rush Event - Surprise Reward
260108908.d: After obtaining this event, you will receive a surprise reward.

260108909.d: Once claimed by the triggerer, an Intel Machine will appear on the World Map. All Commanders in the group can head there to draw a reward. Match 3 Triggerer icons to win the Grand Prize.

260108910.d: A Gem Red Envelope distributed by a Commander (contains 1000 Gems, can be shared by up to 10 members). Once sent, all fellow Alliance members can proceed to the World Map to claim a random amount of Gems from the envelope.

260119001.d: A material used to upgrade any Supreme Decoration (e.g., Toothless Statue, Light Fury Statue). This item is used when upgrading Supreme Decorations in your Base or via the Decor Index.

260121001.d: Use in the [Spring Festival Treasure] event. Launches 1 detector per use. (After the event ends, it will be converted into Gems in the Event Reward Center.)

260121002.d: A token earned from the Spring Festival Treasure event. Used to exchange for rewards in the [Spring Festival Treasure Exchange]. (Expires after the event and can be recycled in the Item Recycle Store.)

260121003.d: A chest earned from Lion Dance, it grants a random reward. Once the designated number of chests are opened, a grand prize is unlocked: Detector x3!

260121004.d: The event presents meticulously prepared for you. Open it to get one random gift, with a small chance to get Spring Festival Treasure Token x100!

260121005.d: Use this item during the Lion Dance Contest to cheer on your Alliance Commander and earn bountiful rewards!
